title: Synthetic Title Selection Loop
creator: XinOne project
generation: uv run python tools/sound/sfx_generator.py --input-file scores/shared-title-selection-bgm.mml --style square --duty 0.5 --track-file scores/shared-title-selection-bgm-bass.mml --track-style triangle --attack 0.005 --decay 0.05 --sustain 0.65 --release 0.05 --volume 0.85 -o output/bgm/title-selection (44.1 kHz); then resample to 22.05 kHz mono 16-bit PCM via scipy.signal.resample_poly(audio, up=1, down=2) and scale peak to ~0.82.
